mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resume WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND cycle_id = #{cycleId}

SELECT r.* FROM resume r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND u.major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM resume_field_value rv JOIN resume_field_definition rf ON rv.field_id = rf.field_id WHERE rv.resume_id = r.resume_id AND rf.field_label = '期望部门' AND rv.field_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{expectedDepartment}, '%') )
AND r.cycle_id = #{cycleId}
AND r.status IN
#{item}
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(r.resume_id) FROM resume r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND u.major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM resume_field_value rv JOIN resume_field_definition rf ON rv.field_id = rf.field_id WHERE rv.resume_id = r.resume_id AND rf.field_label = '期望部门' AND rv.field_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{expectedDepartment}, '%') )
AND r.cycle_id = #{cycleId}
AND r.status IN
#{item}
